sequencing aris rodesac brzanebebi sruldeba tanmimdevrobit

selection aris archevani
iterior gameoreba

for loop aris rodesac gvexmareba rodesac raimes gamoyeneba bevrjer gviwevs

chemi sayvareli 5 kerzi

mogesalmebit am gverdze aris nachvenebi chemi sayvareli kerzebi da misi receptebi

1.khinkali

is mzaddeba xorcs sunelebsa da coms

2.xachapuri

is mzaddeba yvelisgan da comisgan

3.lobiani

is mzaddeba lobiosgan da comisgan

4.mwadi

is mzaddeba shemwvari goris xorcisgan

5.shaurma

is mzadeba xorcisgan salatisgan pomidvrisgan wiwakisgan da xaxvisgan
